MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-26-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

NTC OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CORRECT ARBITRATION AWARD AND CONFIRM AWARD AS CORRECTED AND REQ. FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER ALLSTATE INSURANCE HEARING SET FOR JAN-26-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER ALLSTATE INSURANCE'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CORRECT ARBITRATION AWARD AND CONFIRM AWARD AS CORRECTED IS GRANTED IN PART. THE AWARD IS CORRECTED TO REDUCE THE AMOUNT OF COSTS AWARDED TO MR. SUNG BY $4875 AND CONFIRMED AS CORRECTED. THE ARBITRATOR EXCEEDED HIS AUTHORITY IN AWARDING ARBITRATION EXPENSES WHICH THE PARTIES CONTRACTUALLY AGREED WOULD BE SHARED EQUALLY. THE ARBITRATOR DID NOT EXCEED HIS AUTHORITY IN AWARDING OTHER COSTS, WHICH DID NOT INCLUDE ATTORNEY'S FEES OR FEES PAID TO MEDICAL OR OTHER EXPERT WITNESSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR # 7077
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, PETER

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Correct Arbitration Award And Confirm Award As Corrected And Req. For Statement Of Decision
Off Calendar Jan-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAUL S. SHENG OF CLAPP MORONEY, TEL. NO. (650) 989-5400 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. SHAWN R. MILLER OF THE DOLAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 421-2800 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER ALLSTATE INSURANCE'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Correct Arbitration Award And Confirm Award As Corrected is Granted in part. The award is corrected to reduce the amount of costs awarded to Mr. Sung by $4875 and confirmed as corrected. The Arbitrator exceeded his authority in awarding arbitration expenses which the parties contractually agreed would be shared equally. The Arbitrator did not exceed his authority in awarding other costs, which did not include attorney's fees or fees paid to medical or other expert witnesses. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)
